title: Transformer
description: Represents a B2B Data Interchange transformer — defines how X12 EDI documents are converted to and from JSON or XML using mapping templates.

transformerArn.description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the transformer

fileFormat.description: Output file format for the transformer

mappingTemplate.description: JSONata or XSLT mapping template content

ediType.description: EDI type configuration for the transformer

transactionSet.description: X12 transaction set (e.g. X12_850, X12_856, X12_810)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transformer was created

modifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the transformer was last modified
